negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_75c13cf4-888d-4fbe-bc67-eef9e7e716b5
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, likely captured by a dashboard camera, showing a suburban street intersection on an overcast day. The road is marked with yellow lines and appears wet, suggesting recent rainfall. Several vehicles are present: a white sedan is stopped at the intersection, facing the camera, while a black SUV is positioned further ahead, also stationary. To the left, a silver pickup truck is stopped at the intersection, and to the right, a dark-colored SUV is parked near the sidewalk. Residential houses with various roof colors and styles line both sides of the street, with some featuring small front yards and trees. A stop sign is visible on the right side of the frame, indicating the traffic rules for this intersection.  As the video progresses, the white sedan begins to move forward, slowly crossing the intersection. The black SUV remains stationary throughout the sequence, maintaining its position at the center of the frame. The silver pickup truck on the left begins to move forward, and the dark-colored SUV on the right continues to stay parked, with no noticeable movement. The scene captures multiple vehicle interactions at a 4-way stop, illustrating typical right-of-way behavior. The wet road surface and overcast sky persist, contributing to the subdued ambiance of the scene. By the final frame, the white sedan has completed its crossing, and the silver pickup truck has advanced from its original position, while some other vehicles remain unchanged, maintaining the calm and quiet atmosphere of the residential area.  A medium shot from a slightly elevated perspective, capturing the interaction between the vehicles and the stop sign.
